summary: Iteration 9 testing complete for Simplifii-β EdTech app. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All 14 frontend tests passed (100%). New features verified: Concept Visualiser (Tool #9) with 5 visual scene cards, ELI5 toggle, key takeaways, quiz with 3 questions, 5 related concepts. Enhanced Accessibility panel with font size slider (14-24px), line height slider (1.4-2.4), letter spacing slider (0-0.15em), live preview text. Dashboard and Landing page updated to show 9 tools. Navigation includes Visualiser link. Guided tour appears for first-time users on Concept Visualiser page.

critical_code_review_comments: Concept Visualiser API correctly returns 5 scenes with visual metaphors, icons, colours, and complexity levels
Quiz questions have 4 options each with correctIndex and explanation
Accessibility CSS custom properties (--app-font-size, --app-line-height, --app-letter-spacing) applied on body element
GuidedTour component uses localStorage key 'simplifii_tour_concept' for first-time user detection
All 9 tools properly listed in Dashboard.js tools array and Landing.js tools array
Navigation.js includes Visualiser link pointing to /concept-visualiser

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check BYPASSED for owner testing - payments still create real Stripe checkout sessions
mocked_apis.Concept Visualiser: Uses real Emergent LLM Key (Claude Sonnet 4.5) - returns actual AI-generated content

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 complete. Concept Visualiser (Tool #9) fully functional with 5 scene cards, ELI5 toggle, key takeaways with checkboxes, quiz with celebrations, and related concept navigation. Enhanced Accessibility panel has 3 sliders (font size 14-24px, line height 1.4-2.4, letter spacing 0-0.15em) with live preview. All settings persist via localStorage and CSS custom properties. Guided tour appears on first visit to Concept Visualiser page (uses localStorage key 'simplifii_tour_concept'). Cookie-based auth with session_token cookie. All 9 tools accessible from Dashboard and Landing page.

concept_visualiser_page.details: Input field, ELI5 toggle, Visualise button, 1 ticket cost, guided tour for first-time users

accessibility_toolbar.details: 5 buttons: Text, Dyslexia, Contrast, Motion, More

accessibility_panel.details: Font size slider (14-24px), Line height slider (1.4-2.4), Letter spacing slider (0-0.15em), Preview text, Reset button, Settings saved automatically
